zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Marion Stewart於1457年出生在蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾馮 藍妮克絲時，她的父親Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Lennox32歲，母親Margaret Montgomery Countess of Lennox33歲。她和Robert Crichton- I. Fourth Lord Crichton Of Sanquhar Of Kennwilld至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1529年12月9日在她的家鄉享年72歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾馮 藍妮克絲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Marion Stewart于1457年出生在苏格兰登巴頓史爾馮 藍妮克絲时，她的父亲Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Lennox32岁，母亲Margaret Montgomery Countess of Lennox33岁。她和Robert Crichton- I. Fourth Lord Crichton Of Sanquhar Of Kennwilld至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1529年12月9日在她的家乡享年72岁，埋葬在苏格兰登巴頓史爾馮 藍妮克絲。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Marion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Marion Stewart was born in 1457, in The Lennox, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, her father, Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Lennox, was 32 and her mother, Margaret Montgomery Countess of Lennox, was 33. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Robert Crichton- I. Fourth Lord Crichton Of Sanquhar Of Kennwilld. She died on 9 December 1529, in her hometown, at the age of 72, and was buried in The Lennox, Dunbartonshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Marion Stewart est née en 1457, à The Lennox, Dunbartonshire, Écosse, son père, Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Lennox, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Margaret Montgomery Countess of Lennox, avait 33 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Robert Crichton- I. Fourth Lord Crichton Of Sanquhar Of Kennwilld. Elle est décédée le 9 décembre 1529, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterrée à The Lennox, Dunbartonshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Marion Stewart 1457 in The Lennox, Dunbartonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Lennox 32 und ihre Mutter Margaret Montgomery Countess of Lennox 33. Sie hatte mit Robert Crichton- I. Fourth Lord Crichton Of Sanquhar Of Kennwilld mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 9. Dezember 1529 im Alter von 72 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in The Lennox, Dunbartonshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Marion Stewart è nata il nel 1457 nel The Lennox, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Lennox, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Margaret Montgomery Countess of Lennox, aveva 33 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Robert Crichton- I. Fourth Lord Crichton Of Sanquhar Of Kennwilld. Morì il 9 dicembre 1529, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolta a The Lennox, Dunbartonshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Marion Stewartが1457年にスコットランドダンバートンシュアイアス レノックスで生まれた時，父Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Lennoxは32歳，母Margaret Montgomery Countess of Lennoxは33歳であった。彼女はRobert Crichton- I. Fourth Lord Crichton Of Sanquhar Of Kennwilldとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1529年12月9日に故郷で72歳で死去し，スコットランドダンバートンシュアイアス レノックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Marion Stewart(이)가 1457년 스컷랜드 던바토실르 테 렌스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Lennox(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Montgomery Countess of Lennox(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 Robert Crichton- I. Fourth Lord Crichton Of Sanquhar Of Kennwilld(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1529년 12월 9일 그녀의 고향에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 던바토실르 테 렌스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Marion Stewart nasceu em 1457, em The Lennox, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Lennox, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Montgomery Countess of Lennox, tinha 33 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Robert Crichton- I. Fourth Lord Crichton Of Sanquhar Of Kennwilld. Ela faleceu em 9 de dezembro de 1529, em sua cidade natal, com 72 anos, e foi sepultada em The Lennox, Dunbartonshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Marion Stewart родилась в 1457 г. в местности т леннокс, дунбартоншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Lennox было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Montgomery Countess of Lennox, 33. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Robert Crichton- I. Fourth Lord Crichton Of Sanquhar Of Kennwilld. Она умерла 9 декабря 1529 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 72 лет и была похоронена в местности т леннокс, дунбартоншир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Marion Stewart nació en 1457, en The Lennox, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Lennox, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Margaret Montgomery Countess of Lennox, tenía 33 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Robert Crichton- I. Fourth Lord Crichton Of Sanquhar Of Kennwilld. Murió el 9 de diciembre de 1529, en su pueblo, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultada en The Lennox, Dunbartonshire, Scotland.
